review.verdict: The cleanest managed blogging platform for devs who want custom domain plus zero ops.
review.best_for: Developers running a personal blog on a custom domain without self-hosting.
review.not_for: Teams needing full ownership, advanced theming, or monetization-first platforms.

lock_in.reason: Custom domain, GraphQL API, exportable content
